verify_all.name: dx forge verify-package --all

honest_scope: This report summarizes local Forge adoption evidence for one existing project path.
It proves source-owned package state, receipts, docs, route artifacts, and no direct node_modules creation for the checked path.
It is not a universal npm replacement claim and not a full framework benchmark.

package_specific_checks.name: migration-static-site-docs
package_specific_checks.message: Forge migration docs and package README state the honest static-only scope.

package_specific_checks.name: migration-static-site-receipts
package_specific_checks.message: Forge receipts include migration/static-site package metadata, file maps, and no-lifecycle policy evidence.

package_specific_checks.name: migration-static-site-asset-mapping
package_specific_checks.message: The migration seed includes asset source/target mapping notes in source and fixture files.

package_specific_checks.name: migration-static-site-manual-review
package_specific_checks.message: Manual-review warnings are visible in the rendered component, typed content, fixture, and README.

package_specific_checks.name: migration-static-site-source-files
package_specific_checks.message: All migration/static-site source files exist and are tracked by the Forge source manifest.

package_specific_checks.name: migration-static-site-no-node-modules
package_specific_checks.message: The migration package verification path did not create a node_modules directory.

yellow_default_block.evidence: DX-WWW error: Internal DX-WWW error Forge update for `shadcn/ui/button` variant `default`

red_quarantine.evidence: DX-WWW error: Internal DX-WWW error Forge update for `shadcn/ui/button` variant `default`

honest_scope: This joins existing local Forge adoption evidence into one source-owned package review artifact.
It proves curated package docs, receipts, advisory placeholders, update traffic, local-edit yellow review, rollback, and no node_modules for the example app path.
It still does not claim arbitrary npm ingestion, live advisory coverage, or production customer adoption.
